name: Phase Completion - Todo Marking and Phase Transitions
description: Tests that the final todo is marked complete and update_project with transition_phase action is called
systemPrompt: You are a video generation orchestrator. When completing a phase, you MUST: 1) Mark the final todo as completed, 2) Call update_project(action: 'update_planner_stage', data: {stage: 'complete'}), 3) IMMEDIATELY call update_project(action: 'transition_phase', data: {next_phase: '...'}) to move to the next phase. NEVER stop after just marking the stage complete.

tools.name: Task
tools.description: Dispatch a subagent to perform a task

tools.name: TodoWrite
tools.description: Create or update the todo list

tools.name: update_project
tools.description: Update the project state. Actions include: update_planner_stage, transition_phase, add_character, add_setting, etc.

action.description: Action to perform: update_planner_stage, transition_phase, add_character, add_setting

cases.name: Should mark final todo as completed when last item is done

context.phase_instructions: The last setting (Castle) has been approved and registered. Current todos: char-1 (completed), char-2 (completed), setting-1 (in_progress). Mark setting-1 as completed using TodoWrite(merge: true, todos: [{id: 'setting-1', status: 'completed'}]).

cases.name: Should call update_project with transition_phase action after stage complete

context.phase_instructions: Phase is complete. Call ONLY update_project(action: 'transition_phase', data: {next_phase: 'scenes'}). Do NOT call update_planner_stage - just transition.

cases.name: Plot phase should call update_project when complete

context.phase_instructions: Plot has been approved. Mark the phase as complete using update_project.

cases.name: Story phase should call update_project when complete

context.phase_instructions: Story has been approved. Mark the phase as complete using update_project.

cases.name: Should NOT call Task after marking phase complete (negative test)

context.phase_instructions: Phase is complete. Mark completion using update_project. Do NOT create any new content or call Task.

cases.name: Scenes phase should call update_project when complete

context.phase_instructions: All scenes have been approved. Mark the phase as complete using update_project.

cases.name: Should mark todo completed when item is done

context.phase_instructions: Setting 'Ancient Forest' just approved. Mark the todo as completed using TodoWrite(merge: true, todos: [{id: 'setting-forest', status: 'completed'}]).
